prompt_text:
### Demographics: 46-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.3 kg; Height 169.4 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 9.2%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 217mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 236mg/dL; current 194mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.2kg; 9 months ago 59.9kg; 6 months ago 64.2kg; 3 months ago 58.9kg; current 62.3kg), Height (12 months ago 169.4cm; 9 months ago 169.4cm; 6 months ago 169.4cm; 3 months ago 169.4cm; current 169.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 37U/L), AST (12 months ago 48U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 51U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 70mg/g; 9 months ago 56mg/g; 6 months ago 74mg/g; 3 months ago 78mg/g; current 66mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 174mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.68 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
